title: 9 Herbal Creams For Upper Abdominal Pain
description: Cinchona officinalis creams contains quinine, a natural compound that helps with upper abdominal pain by reducing inflammation and relaxing the muscles in the stomach. The creams also contain other constituents like tannins and alkaloids, which have antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties.
